name: GF Fucks Bully | Annie
description:
Your GF is sick of watching you be tormented by your bully, so when she confronts him and is offered a deal, does she take it? Does she begin to enjoy it?

Note: Bot wasn’t made with it being avoidable in mind, and I’ve heard mixed opinions on people’s attempts. Some say easy, some say not truly avoidable, some say not at all.
creator: ZonalNut
